name: self-docs
description: List and read scratch's own user guides. Use this to find documentation about scratch features, commands, and workflows. This is NOT for the user's project files — it is for scratch's own help documentation.

action.description: list: show available guides. read: show the contents of a specific guide.

guide.description: Guide name (e.g., 'indexing', 'projects'). Required when action is 'read'.
